objectives: Create minimal XML test fixtures for 10 new ISO 20022 message types
constraints: Fixtures must use correct namespace URI: urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:{msg_id}
Document root element with message-specific child element
Only include required (non-optional) fields in fixtures and struct constructions
Generated types must not be hand-edited
important_facts: ChoiceWrapper<T> wraps xs:choice enums via #[serde(rename = '$value')] for quick-xml compatibility
Document structs have no struct-level serde rename - they serialize as <Document>
quick-xml de::from_str ignores xmlns attribute during deserialization - namespace-bearing fixtures parse cleanly
pacs_009 CreditTransferTransaction56: dbtr and cdtr are required (non-optional) BranchAndFinancialInstitutionIdentification6
Integration tests use relative path ../../testdata/xml/ from crates/mx20022-parse/
All 10 new message families are feature-gated: pain and camt require features = ['all'] (already enabled in parse Cargo.toml)
decisions_made: Fixture-based tests for envelope detection and struct-level roundtrip tests built from Rust code: avoids namespace serialization gaps since quick-xml se does not emit xmlns attributes
Both fixture-parse and struct-roundtrip tests written: fixture-parse validates the XML files directly; roundtrip tests validate serialization identity
pacs_009 fixture required adding Dbtr and Cdtr elements after test failure revealed required fields missing from initial fixture
dependencies: mx20022-model with features=['all'] (already in parse Cargo.toml)
risks_issues: pacs_028 TxInf fixture includes fields that are all optional - fixture parses without them: resolved
pacs_009 CreditTransferTransaction56.dbtr and .cdtr are required non-optional: fixture updated to include them

iteration.summary: Created 10 minimal XML fixture files and a 909-line roundtrip_all.rs test file covering all 10 newly generated ISO 20022 message types. Each message type has: a struct-level serialize/deserialize roundtrip test asserting identity, an envelope detection test using the fixture file, and a fixture-parse test verifying the XML file deserializes correctly. All 30 new tests pass alongside the existing 220+ tests across the workspace. The pacs_009 fixture required a correction after the initial run revealed that CreditTransferTransaction56.dbtr and .cdtr are required (non-optional) fields.
outputs_produced: 10 minimal XML fixture files in testdata/xml/{family}/
All cargo test --workspace --all-features passing (30 new + 220+ existing)
next_actions: Consider adding fixture XML files for pain and camt to the CLI integration tests
Item #7 (download missing XSD schemas and generate Phase 1 types) should be marked complete
